message:
feat(storage): add advisory file locks + commit queue batching

Implements per-project concurrency control for archive writes:
- FileLock: advisory lock with owner metadata JSON, configurable
  timeout (60s), stale timeout (180s), and max retries (5)
- Stale lock detection via dead PID check or age threshold
- with_project_lock() convenience wrapper
- CommitQueue: batches up to 10 non-conflicting commits within
  50ms window, falls back to sequential for conflicts
- commit_paths_with_retry(): git index.lock contention handling
  with exponential backoff (100ms-1.6s) and stale lock cleanup
- heal_archive_locks(): startup scan for stale/orphaned lock files
- 11 new tests (20 total), all passing

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
